facts.statement: `FunctionDictGetNoType` accurately casts and shape-checks the complete multi-attribute default tuple before individual consumption.
`executeDictionaryRequest` retrieves and restores every element in the multi-attribute tuple path, keeping an unused bad fallback observable.
The scalar path is distinct and uses `getColumn`, so it is not interchangeable with the tuple path merely because one field is consumed.

The canonical implementation is the runtime dictionary function, with `FunctionDictGet`/`FunctionDictGetOrDefault` and FunctionFactory registration as accepted aliases; the absent analyzer pass is excluded.

band_derivation: New fixture-local runtime task with four uniform pinned facts; tolerance is one full fact (1/4).
